questions.question: Does the school district have a policy for sustainability?
questions.answer: Yes, the school district has a policy for sustainability. The Mamaroneck Union Free School District (MUFSD) commits to empowering students to become lifelong, active stewards of communities and the planet, and to operate more sustainably. This includes developing curricula focused on ecological sustainability, promoting student leadership in sustainability, and infusing sustainable practices in school operations.
